commands.purpose: Table view of tax_rates. Filterable by tenant, jurisdiction (accepts ULID or ISO country/state code), rate_type, and --active (effective_from <= today AND (effective_to IS NULL OR effective_to > today)).
Trigger SyncTaxRatesFromProviderJob for a tenant + provider. --dry-run reports what would change without persisting. Weekly cron; this command is for on-demand runs (post-jurisdiction-fiscal-change).
View tax_jurisdictions. --platform-only filters tenant_id IS NULL; --tenant-only filters tenant_id IS NOT NULL (custom jurisdictions). Default: both.

Scriptable jurisdiction create. --tenant absent = platform-reference jurisdiction (requires super_admin). Validates against ISO 3166-1 + ISO 3166-2. Requires tax_jurisdiction_custom entitlement when tenant is set.
Table view of tax_exemptions. Filterable by verification_status (pending / verified / rejected / expired), customer, jurisdiction, and --expiring-within-days for the 60/30/7-day warning cadence.

Manually mark an exemption verified. --verified-by required (ULID of the reviewing user; defaults to the authed platform admin). --note optional (written to audit trail). Refuses when verification_status != 'pending'.

Manually mark an exemption rejected. --reason required (one of: invalid_certificate / expired_at_creation / jurisdiction_mismatch / fraudulent / other). Fires TaxExemptionRejectedNotification. Refuses when verification_status != 'pending'.
Read-only tax_calculations view. Filter by tenant, provider, invoice_line_id, date range. Default sort: calculated_at DESC.

Verbose read of one calculation: base fields + tax_rate_snapshot + exemption_applied + provider_metadata + linked invoice_line. Support tool for regulator inquiries about specific historical tax computations.

Scriptable provider config create/update. --config-file=path/to/config.json is validated against the per-provider JSON schema. --jurisdictions is the list of country codes this provider handles for the tenant. --dry-run validates + shows diff without persisting. Encrypts config at rest.
Send a synthetic calculation via the provider's sandbox endpoint. Reports the resolved tax amount + latency + any errors. Used by ops to validate a tenant's provider config.
